summary.rootCauseDetail: All 6 assetKeys exist on disk (vi-v1 profile) and are marked available=true in manifest.json. Runtime failure occurs in tryPlayFromStaticManifest (ttsRuntime.ts ~L740): hasStrictDesktopGrade=true blocks playback with 'Chưa có file giọng đọc offline cho lớp N' before file lookup happens. No grade is registered as downloaded in user state during web test.
summary.noteOnResolvedSource: resolvedSource='web-offline-manifest' in test output is a hardcoded override inside rejectStaticPlayback(). The actual failure originated at the desktop-offline grade-gate, not during manifest URL resolution.
summary.actionRequired: Two separate actions needed: (1) Fix Google TTS credentials and generate missing 19,743 audio files. (2) Investigate web-context grade-pack activation — web users in static mode should not require Electron download state to access lesson-card audio.
